core_mechanism: Schramm-Loewner evolution: a one-parameter family of conformally invariant random curves generated by the Loewner differential equation driven by a Brownian motion of diffusivity kappa, whose single parameter kappa sorts critical-interface fractal statistics into universality classes
brief_reason: The abstract identifies the iso-height contour lines as conformally invariant curves belonging to the SLE_kappa family with diffusivity kappa~3, sharing the same statistics as critical-Ising domain walls, which is exactly the SLE classification of critical interfaces by a single diffusivity parameter.
